violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Damp rag laying on the cutting board of the food prep table and no sanitizer bucket.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not properly date marked. -Small containers of pasta in the walk in cooler need date marked.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
